• Validated output quality via human-in-the-loop evaluation and synchronized Time-Series analysis of melodic and dynamic features

architecture, CoT reasoning, and structured RAG context to deliver tactical insights

NEW YORK CRIME WITH MACHINE LEARNING Spring 2025
• Generated neighborhood safety labels (2010–2024) using PCA and K-Means on NYC arrest data for supervised modeling
• Mapped safety labels to shooting data and trained Random Forest/ANN classifiers, achieving 95%+ accuracy
MARCH DATA CRUNCH MADNESS Spring 2025
• Built ML pipeline for March Madness 2025 with feature engineering, PCA, and Reddit sentiment analysis
• Ensemble-trained XGBoost, Random Forest, and MLP across 500+ LLM-generated feature sets to correctly predict the champion
TECHNICAL SKILLS
• Certification: AWS Data Engineering, AWS Cloud Security, Databricks for GenAI, NVIDIA Augment LLM, UiPath Developer
• Proficiency: Python, Scikit-learn, TensorFlow, PyTorch, NLTK, Tableau, SQL, R, Git
